LandingPage.marqueeFadesCuts: FADES • CUTS • STYLE • CULTURE • PRECISION • VIBES
LandingPage.aboutText: We're a crew of barbers who actually give a damn about your look. No outdated magazines, no awkward small talk unless you're into that. Just clean cuts, good music, and vibes that hit different.
LandingPage.servicesText: Every cut is a vibe. Pick your service and we'll handle the rest.
LandingPage.marqueeBlended: BLENDED • SINCE 2012 • ULAANBAATAR • CLEAN CUTS • NO CAP
LandingPage.galleryText: See the cuts. Feel the vibe. This is what we do.
LandingPage.bookText: Pick your barber, choose your service, select your time. No cap, just clean cuts secured in seconds.
LandingPage.ctaText: Walk in looking regular. Walk out looking unreal. That's the BLENDED promise.

1.name: The Clean Fade
1.description: Precision skin fade with razor lineup.

2.name: Textured Crop
2.description: Modern crop with textured finish on top.

3.name: Buzz & Beard
3.description: Full buzz cut with beard sculpting.

4.name: The Full Send
4.description: Cut, fade, beard, hot towel. The whole deal.

5.name: Color Drop
5.description: Bold color streaks or full bleach treatment.

Footer.brandDesc: Not your average barbershop. Premium cuts, clean fades, and a culture that hits different. Built for the new generation.

AboutPage.story1: BLNDED started in 2012 from the heart of Ulaanbaatar with one mission: give the new generation a barbershop that actually gets them.
AboutPage.story2: No outdated vibes. No dusty waiting rooms. We built a space where you walk in, feel the energy, and walk out knowing you look absolutely dialed.
AboutPage.story3: Our barbers aren't just skilled—they're artists who study structure, texture, and your whole vibe to create something that's uniquely you.
AboutPage.shopDesc: A space designed to set the mood. Walk in and feel the difference.

philosophy.precisionDesc: Every fade, every lineup — calculated to the millimeter. We don't guess, we engineer your look with surgical accuracy.
philosophy.cultureDesc: This isn't just a barbershop, it's a movement. Music, art, community — we built a space where the culture lives.
philosophy.integrityDesc: Clean products, honest prices, no shortcuts. We keep it 100 with everything we do — from the chair to the counter.

ProductsPage.shopDesc: The same products our barbers use in the chair. Tested, trusted, no filler. Tap any product to see full details.
ProductsPage.noProducts: No products in this category yet.

BarbersPage.desc: Every barber in this shop is hand-picked. They don't just cut hair — they craft looks. Tap on any barber to see their profile and book directly.
